Hide scraps

Hide scraps
Type: Material
Value: 0
Fine Value: 6
Keyword: Hide
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

Pieces of ruined hide that could be assembled into usable material.

The Hide scraps item is a material.

Contents

  • 1 Uses
    • 1.1 Recipe Ingredient
    • 1.2 Job Boards
  • 2 Sources
    • 2.1 Activity Drops
    • 2.2 Chest Drops
  • 3 Guides
  • 4 Gear Sets
  • 5 Related Items
  • 6 Trivia

Uses

Recipe Ingredient

Hide scraps is an ingredient in the following recipe:

Item Name Service
Requirement 		Skills Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Make a basic leather Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 5 5x Hide scraps or 1x Basic hide 1x Basic leather

Job Boards

Hide scraps can be requested from the following job:

Job Board Name Location Quantity Item Type Rewards
Halfling Campgrounds job board Halfling Campgrounds 144 +2  Halfling Rebels Faction Reputation
1x   Hunting chest

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Box trapping Hunting lvl. 40 5-10 51.000%† ~1 in 2 actions 51 steps 32 steps
Deer hunting Hunting lvl. 35 8-12 27.750%† ~1 in 4 actions 115 steps 70 steps
Squirrel hunting Hunting lvl. 15 2-4 96.000%† ~1 in 1 actions 36 steps 28 steps
Wolf hunting Hunting lvl. 25 5-8 75.000%† ~1 in 1 actions 45 steps 30 steps

†Note: This activity rolls for loot more than once.
‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
(Per Roll)
Hunting chest 10-20 6.820% 24.614% ~1 in 4 chests
(~1 in 15 rolls)

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.
